entries.title: One For All Must Stay Secret Early

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: One For All's transfer mechanics and stockpile nature are known only to a small circle early in the story.
content.injection: Early classmates must not casually infer that Deku inherited All Might's Quirk unless the story establishes that reveal.
constraints: Use this as a spoiler and audience-knowledge gate, not as public exposition.
antiLore: Do not let later canon or private secrets leak into earlier Context unless the story explicitly introduced them.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

visibility.notes: Adjust according to scene-specific reveals and accepted story divergence.
